code:
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  [Infra_RedisCache] --> Queued:Workflow Submitted
  Queued --> Running:Started First Step
  Queued --> Failed:Problem starting First Step
  Running --> InProgress:Succeeded Non-Terminal Step
  InProgress --> Running:Started Next Step
  Queued --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Completed:Succeeded Final Step
  Paused --> Running:Resumed by User
  Running --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Failed --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Failed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Cancelled --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Cancelled --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Completed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Queued --> Paused:Paused by User
  Paused --> Queued:Resumed by User

  Queued:queued
  Running:running
  Failed:failed
  InProgress:in_progress
  Cancelled:cancelled
  Completed:completed
  Paused:paused

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个工作流状态机，从Redis缓存基础设施触发。核心状态包括Queued、Running、InProgress、Failed、Completed、Cancelled，还有Paused用于人工介入。方向用LR横向展开。
确认一下：Infra_RedisCache作为触发源，通过"Workflow Submitted"事件进入Queued状态对吗？另外Paused能介入哪些状态？
对的。Paused比较特殊：用户可以在Queued、Running、InProgress这三个状态下暂停，恢复后Running回到自身，Queued和Paused则回到Queued。
好的，我先把主线画出来：Queued通过"Started First Step"到Running，Running成功非终结步骤到InProgress，InProgress再启动下一步回到Running。Completed由Running的"Succeeded Final Step"触发。
失败分支需要细化：启动第一步失败时Queued直接到Failed；另外Failed和Cancelled都支持重试——可以Retrying Step回到InProgress，或者用户Resubmitted回到Queued重新排队。
已添加失败路径。Queued还有一条"Problem starting First Step"到Failed。用户取消的路径我也补上了：Queued、Running、InProgress都能被Cancelled。
Completed之后用户也能Resubmitted回到Queued吗？比如重新执行整个工作流。
是的，Completed有Resubmitted by User回到Queued。所有状态标签我也用小写下划线格式标注好了：queued、running、in_progress、failed、completed、cancelled、paused。整体结构确认无误吗？
确认完成。方向LR，所有转换和状态都对应上了，Paused的双向逻辑也正确。
